description: Configure the OpenBCI GUI to display raw, unfiltered EEG data using the playback file '~/Documents/OpenBCI_GUI/Recordings/OpenBCI-EEG-S001-EyesOpen.txt'. Inspect the raw signal baseline by disabling the Notch and Bandpass filters and adjusting the Time Series vertical scale to 1000 uV. Save a screenshot of the resulting raw data view to '~/Documents/OpenBCI_GUI/Recordings/raw_signal_view.png'.
